product_overview: Grounded is a retrieval-augmented generation system with a verification and self-correction layer that removes unsupported claims from generated answers. It provides a live question-answering API plus lightweight endpoints for health checks, precomputed examples, and serving the React dashboard.
core_goals: Answer user questions using retrieval-augmented generation over the local corpus
Detect and remove claims that are not supported by retrieved evidence
Return per-claim groundedness and source information for transparency
Provide a fast health endpoint and public example data for the dashboard
Serve the React single-page application and static assets from the same backend

features.name: Health check
features.description: Expose a simple liveness probe and report which frontend build is currently being served.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with status ok and frontend set to react or legacy
GET /health when the service is unhealthy -> Receive a non-200 error or no successful response

features.name: Precomputed examples
features.description: Return instant, precomputed verification examples used by the dashboard for demo and exploration purposes.
user_flows: GET /examples -> Receive 200 with a JSON array of precomputed Verification objects including claims, scores, evidence, and sources
GET /examples when the examples file or demo data cannot be loaded -> Receive an error response indicating the examples could not be returned

features.name: Verify a question (core RAG pipeline)
features.description: Accept a user question, retrieve supporting context, generate an answer, verify each claim against the retrieved evidence, and return a corrected grounded answer with claim-level support details.
user_flows: POST /ask with a valid query and optional top_k and mode -> Receive 200 with answer, corrected answer, groundedness score, claims, sources, and note
POST /ask with an out-of-corpus question -> Receive 200 with abstained set to true and a refusal such as I can't answer this from the provided context
POST /ask with invalid input such as missing query, query over 2000 chars, top_k outside 1-10, or unsupported mode -> Receive 422 validation errors
POST /ask when the Ollama generator is unreachable or another pipeline failure occurs -> Receive 503 with a clean error detail

features.name: SPA + static assets
features.description: Serve the built React single-page application for the landing page and client-side routes, plus self-hosted font assets.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with the SPA shell HTML for the landing page
GET /app or any unknown non-API route -> Receive 200 with index.html so client-side routing can render the app
GET /fonts/{file} with a valid woff2 font filename -> Receive 200 with the requested font asset
GET /fonts/{file} with an unknown filename -> Receive a non-200 error such as 404

tech_stack: FastAPI (ASGI API + serves the built React SPA)
ChromaDB (vector store) + BAAI/bge-small embeddings + rank-bm25 (hybrid retrieval over a ~22k-chunk Wikipedia corpus)
MiniCheck DeBERTa-v3 verifier (claim grounding) + Ollama qwen2.5:3b-instruct generator (CPU-only, local)

features.name: Health check
features.description: Liveness probe; also reports whether the React build or legacy static dashboard is being served.

features.name: Precomputed examples
features.description: Returns precomputed real-RAGTruth verification examples as JSON (instant, no model inference). Powers the dashboard example chips.

endpoints.description: List precomputed verification examples (each is a full Verification object with claims, scores, evidence, sources).

response_schema.200: Verification[]  (query, answer, corrected, groundedness, abstained, threshold, claims[], sources[], note)

features.name: Verify a question (core RAG pipeline)
features.description: Runs the live pipeline for an arbitrary question — retrieve from the corpus, generate an answer grounded ONLY in the retrieved context (Ollama), decompose into claims, verify each against the context (MiniCheck), drop unsupported claims, and return both the corrected and annotated answers with per-claim support scores and a groundedness fraction. Out-of-corpus questions abstain ("I can't answer this from the provided context") rather than fabricating. Generation is CPU-bound and SLOW (~60-120s).

endpoints.description: Verify-and-correct an answer to the given question. Slow (live CPU generation).

body.mode: string (optional, one of: drop | flag | regenerate)

response_schema.200: AskResponse { query, answer, corrected, groundedness(float), abstained(bool), threshold(float), iterations(int), claims: [{text, support, supported, evidence}], sources: [{id, source}], note }
response_schema.422: Validation error (missing/empty query, query >2000 chars, top_k out of 1-10, mode not in enum)
response_schema.503: Pipeline error (e.g. Ollama/generator unreachable) surfaced as a clean 503 with detail

depends_on: Ollama generator (qwen2.5:3b-instruct) reachable at OLLAMA_URL (default http://127.0.0.1:11434)

features.name: SPA + static assets
features.description: Serves the built React single-page app for any non-API route, plus self-hosted fonts. Client-side routes (/, /app) all return index.html.

endpoints.description: Serve the SPA shell (landing). Any unknown path also returns index.html (client-side routing).

known_limitations.issue: POST /ask is slow (~60-120s) because generation runs on CPU via Ollama, and the server is single-worker.
known_limitations.impact: Backend tests hitting /ask must use long timeouts (180s+) and must NOT run concurrent /ask requests (the single worker serializes; concurrency causes timeouts).
All endpoints are public; there is no auth flow to test.

known_limitations.issue: Live /ask requires Ollama running with qwen2.5:3b-instruct at OLLAMA_URL; if absent it returns 503.
known_limitations.impact: /ask happy-path tests depend on the local Ollama; /examples and /health do not.
